task: Review the flow and determine whether the primary task can be completed clearly and confidently.
frictionPoints: The 'Go to Builder' button on the Free plan may cause confusion as it does not directly relate to the plan selection task
The buttons on the cards have a 'secondary' variant which may not be prominent enough for a busy mobile-first user
The dense list of features in the CardBody may cause cognitive load for Sam Rushed
confusionPoints: The difference between the plans is not immediately clear due to the amount of information presented
The CardHeader and CardBody do not have clear headings to differentiate them from the rest of the content
recommendations: Emphasize the primary call-to-action for each plan to reduce friction
Use clear and concise headings for each section of the cards to improve clarity
Consider using a more prominent button variant for the plan selection to guide the user's attention
